text: A close-up view of a large, bright blue tarpaulin stretched horizontally, covering a structure. The tarp is secured by visible grommets and straps. Below the tarp, a decorative border runs horizontally, featuring repeating diamond shapes in yellow, red, and green, separated by orange wavy lines. In the background, above the tarp, are dense green trees and the facade of a multi-story building with balconies and laundry hanging.
label: Image
